SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLOBUS ENTERPRISES PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE GLASS TRUST IS NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWES, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GLASS TRUST U/A/D 12/7/92. CHARLES AND ANNIE GLASS FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $3,334.22 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,509.22, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES RECOVERY OF $1333.34 FOR RENT PAID DURING THE RELEVANT PERIOD. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PRIOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF IN COMPENSATION FOR RENT. INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
